headline: Energy companies are trading higher following reports suggesting that two Chinese vessels were prevented from transiting the Strait of Hormuz, signaling ongoing disruptions and reinforcing concerns that Iran continues to restrict traffic through the key energy corridor.

headline: Morgan Stanley Maintains Underweight on APA, Raises Price Target to $43
summary: Morgan Stanley  analyst Devin McDermott   maintains APA (NASDAQ:APA) with a Underweight and raises the price target from $22 to $43.
